name: rembe.de
message: REMBE GmbH Safety + Control is a German company specializing in explosion safety and pressure relief systems. Founded in 1973 and headquartered in Brilon, Germany, REMBE focuses on providing safety solutions across various industries, including food, chemical, pharmaceutical, and wood sectors. The company employs around 250 to 350 people globally and operates several subsidiaries worldwide to support its customers effectively.SITE: www.rembe.de Address : Gallbergweg 21, 59929 Brilon, GermanyTEL#: +49 2961 7405-0ALL DATA SIZE: ≈1tb 1.
